signals.headline: Jerome Powell Confirms He Will Remain Fed Chair Until Successor Confirmed** | **YES** | **HIGH** confidence
signals.raw:
Jerome Powell Confirms He Will Remain Fed Chair Until Successor Confirmed** | **YES** | **HIGH** confidence

Powell stated he would serve as chair pro tem if his successor is not confirmed by the end of his term in May 2026, as required by law, amid President Trump's nomination of Kevin Warsh, who awaits Senate confirmation.[1][2][3] He also affirmed no intention to leave the Fed Board until an on
